---
title: "Longitudinal Evidence on the Economic Returns to Disability Services"
author:
  - name: Michelle Yin
    affiliation: Northwestern University
  - name: Hussain Hadah
    url: http://www.hussainhadah.com/
    orcid: 0000-0002-8705-6386
    affiliation: Tulane University
  - name: Regina Seo
    affiliation: Northwestern University
categories:
  - Disability services
  - Labor markets
  - Returns to services
  - Policy Evaluation
  - Administrative data
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    Michelle Yin, <strong>Hussain Hadah</strong>, and Regina Seo, "Longitudinal Evidence on the Economic Returns to Disability Services." RISEI Lab, Northwestern University.
  extra: >-
---

## Citation

Yin, Michelle, Hadah, Hussain, and Seo, Regina (2026). Longitudinal evidence on the economic returns to disability services [working paper]. RISEI Lab, Northwestern University.

```bibtex
@misc{YinHadahSeo2026DisabilityServices,
  title        = {Longitudinal Evidence on the Economic Returns to Disability Services},
  author       = {Yin, Michelle and Hadah, Hussain and Seo, Regina},
  year         = {2026},
  note         = {Working paper, RISEI Lab, Northwestern University}
}
```
